channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: SpaceX IPO takeaways: SPCX closes at $161, jumping 19% after record debut
item.description: SpaceX rallied in its first day as a public company. CNBC provided updates throughout the day.

item.title: Trump administration: Iran deal signing likely in coming days, but not '100%' certain
item.description: A deal to end the Iran war could be signed soon, a senior Trump administration official said, following recent conflicting statements from the warring nations.

item.title: Switzerland is voting on whether to cap its population at 10 million. Here's what to know
item.description: Switzerland votes on a population cap that could tighten immigration and put its EU free-movement agreement under pressure.

item.title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
item.description: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.

item.title: What comes next for SpaceX after the IPO will be in focus for investors. Here's what's ahead
item.description: Whether SpaceX can maintain the early enthusiasm in the coming days will be telling.

item.title: Former Tesla board member says SpaceX needs to achieve 2 of its 3 moonshots to keep its valuation
item.description: SpaceX has achieved its goal of becoming the largest IPO on record.

item.title: Paramount-WBD merger wins approval from DOJ
item.description: The DOJ approval is an important milestone for the roughly $110 billion deal, though it could still face legal challenges from state attorneys general.

item.title: Small investors scrambled to get in on the SpaceX IPO, even as some believe the valuation is 'stupid'
item.description: SpaceX set a fixed price of $135 per share in the leadup to its IPO on Friday, placing its valuation at $1.77 trillion. Shares rallied more than 25%.

item.title: Trump name must be removed from Kennedy Center by Friday night as appeals court rejects delay
item.description: President Donald Trump had asked a federal appeals court to suspend a lower-court order that his name before removed from the performing arts center.

item.title: SpaceX market cap tops $2 trillion after shares of Elon Musk's rocket company gain 19% on debut
item.description: SpaceX shares soared on Friday as trading commenced on the Nasdaq.

item.title: For Warsh as Fed chair, silence may be the point
item.description: Kevin Warsh will hold his first Fed meeting, giving markets the first public look at how he'll communicate as chair of the Federal Reserve.

item.title: Pirro's losses in Fed investigation should stay on the books, judge rules
item.description: In a scathing ruling, Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate his earlier orders.

item.title: Top House Republican’s family investment poised to benefit from SpaceX IPO
item.description: Republican Rep. Lisa McClain’s husband bought up to $250,000 in Elon Musk’s xAI before it was folded into SpaceX ahead of its IPO.

item.title: SpaceX hit with sell rating by CFRA shortly after IPO
item.description: Reusable Starship rocket could prove to be a "bottleneck" for multiple segments, research firm says.

item.title: Call Kevin Warsh the Fed 'chairman'
item.description: Kevin Warsh's two immediate predecessors preferred to be called the Fed "chair." For Warsh, it's "chairman" of the Federal Reserve.

item.title: As investors flock to SpaceX, one trader eyes a sleepy 'stealth' play
item.description: If you're looking for something a little more terrestrial, there's one stock that investors are overlooking.

item.title: Jim Cramer says it's not too late to buy SpaceX — under one condition
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said it's not too late to buy SpaceX if investors view the company as a long-term bet on space exploration.

item.title: SpaceX COO Shotwell says Tesla tie-up ‘might make Elon’s life a little easier’
item.description: As SpaceX prepared to hit the Nasdaq following its record IPO, Elon Musk's second-in-command didn't dismiss the possibility of a Tesla tie-up.

item.title: SpaceX 'proxies' plunge as real deal arrives: Here's where traders are buying the dip
item.description: SpaceX "proxy stocks," whose options volumes were booming ahead of Friday's historic initial public offering, are unwinding gains.

item.title: Social Security COLA for 2027 may jump to 4.7%, one estimate finds. This chart shows prices driving the increase
item.description: As inflation climbs, Social Security beneficiaries may see a higher cost-of-living adjustment in 2027. Here's which costs spiked most over the past 12 months.

item.title: Goldman nets a big payday for SpaceX IPO. Plus, what drove our winners and losers this week
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: IPO investing: What are IPO stocks and the best brokers for IPO access?
item.description: Some brokerages offer IPO access before a company goes public, but anyone can buy shares once trading begins.

item.title: Judge blocks DOJ 'anti-weaponization' fund for longer, wants guarantee it’s dead
item.description: A judge gave Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent a week to submit a sworn declaration the DOJ fund was not going forward.

item.title: New SpaceX millionaires are reinventing the business of managing large wealth
item.description: Wealth advisors say SpaceXers have unique ways of addressing their financial challenges, including whiteboarding, troubleshooting and AI.

item.title: SpaceX’s Gwynne Shotwell had IPO doubts for years, now she has a message for investors
item.description: Gwynne Shotwell, long Elon Musk's second-in-command at SpaceX, spoke exclusively with CNBC ahead of her company's highly anticipated IPO.

item.title: Former star U.S. bond manager Kenneth Leech pleads guilty to obstructing 'cherry-picking' probe
item.description: Kenneth Leech, a former star bond manager at Western Asset Management, pleaded guilty on Friday to obstructing a probe into alleged "cherry-picking."

item.title: How to get SpaceX stock — without buying the IPO
item.description: Investors will can hold SpaceX stock by virtue of owning shares in certain mutual funds and exchange-traded funds.

item.title: U.S. crude oil falls below $85 as U.S. and Iran near a deal to reopen Hormuz
item.description: Oil prices fell Friday after a proposed peace deal that would see the Strait of Hormuz reopen was reported by Iranian state media.

item.title: The S&P 500 already made a big call on SpaceX stock and index fund investors need to know it
item.description: The S&P 500 index, where trillions in retirement savings are invested, said no to the SpaceX IPO, the biggest in history. Here's what that means for portfolios.

item.title: Bitcoin's latest plunge revives the debate over owning it—and whether it's just 'crypto being crypto'
item.description: The cryptocurrency's latest selloff is forcing investors to revisit what role, if any, bitcoin should play in a portfolio.
